flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Concordia University-Irvine rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $12.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Concordia University-Irvine fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (60.5% → 49.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Concordia University-Irvine fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (68.0% → 58.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Concordia University-Irvine rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.7k → $43.5k).
